name: MRV Grade
rationale: The credibility of the claimed emission reduction depends entirely on how well it is measured, reported, and independently verified. Digital MRV is rapidly advancing and should be preferred.

bands.label: Digital MRV
bands.monitoring: Continuous IoT/sensor data; satellite imagery with <10m resolution; automated anomaly detection
bands.reporting: Real-time or near-real-time automated reporting; uncertainty quantified
bands.verification: Independent third-party + automated cross-validation; dispute mechanism

bands.label: Enhanced
bands.monitoring: Regular sensor data or high-res satellite; defined monitoring protocol

bands.label: Standard+
bands.monitoring: Periodic sampling per methodology; some remote sensing
bands.reporting: Meets registry requirements; conservative default factors
bands.verification: Standard VVB verification per registry rules

bands.label: Basic
bands.monitoring: Minimum monitoring; reliance on default emission factors
bands.reporting: Basic reporting; significant reliance on estimates

notes: Digital MRV initiatives to track: Verra-Pachama DMRV, ESA SatMRV, Open Forest Protocol, Isometric.
MRV scoring should be re-evaluated at each verification cycle (typically annual).
